text:
From the overall situa-
                                                                                                                    tion of China’s strategy and the regulations and features of financial
                                                                                                                    work, development-oriented finance adheres to “goodness priority”
                                                                                                                    to build long-term credit relationship; adheres to “give more and ask
                                                                                                                    for less” to build sincere credit relationship; adheres to “resource
                                                                                                                    exchange” to build mutual helping credit relationship; adheres to
                                                                                                                    “diversified service” to build flexible credit relationship; and adheres
                                                                                                                    to “focus on key points” to develop credit relationship with countries
                                                                                                                    from the third world, mainly emphasizing on cooperation with
                                                                                                                    Asian, Latin American, and African countries. (5) China needs to handle the following four relationships to ensure
                                                                                                                    that our economy develops in a stable and fast way: (i) the relation-
                                                                                                                    ship between domestic market and international market; (ii) the
                                                                                                                    relationship between real economy and virtual economy; (iii) the
                                                                                                                    relationship between financial innovation and regulation; and
